main_block: All four paths are observational; floral tannins are a barrier candidate rather than a manipulated resistance treatment; no linked total fitness surface or shared allocation cost.
current_permitted_action: Keep four effects separated by role and standardized-slope scale.
prohibited_inference: Do not claim causal trait effects, D2/D3, or direct c_AD calibration.

main_block: Only the total-scent to same-day flower-herbivory path is eligible; pollinator outcomes are population-date and no independent floral B module is identified.
current_permitted_action: Retain the quasi-binomial log-odds record in its own scale stratum.
prohibited_inference: Do not call it a causal scent effect, individual A_to_pollination evidence, D1 evidence, or a direct Part I parameter.

main_block: Visitor exclusion and corolla-damage treatments are not direct independent A or B trait predictors.
current_permitted_action: Keep in the direct-case/M2 ledger only.
prohibited_inference: Do not register a trait-path effect from treatment contrasts.

main_block: Later package has no qualifying source relation or in-package variable dictionary; header names cannot assign trait roles.
current_permitted_action: Retain as a high-information secondary source lead.
prohibited_inference: Do not attribute package rows to the 2013 article or assign resin/bracts/pollen as A or B.

main_block: Exsertion conflates flower and bract components; public supplement lacks a recoverable individual panel.
current_permitted_action: Retain as qualitative M2 mechanism context.
prohibited_inference: Do not enter a quantitative registry effect or identify separate A and B paths.

main_block: No eligible trait-to-florivore estimate with uncertainty and denominator; floral terpenoids are not independently justified as B.
current_permitted_action: Retain as descriptive one-channel mechanism evidence.
prohibited_inference: Do not treat it as a four-path effect or B-path estimate.

main_block: No public full text, supplement, or verified linked data package.
current_permitted_action: No further automated work in the public-only phase.
prohibited_inference: Do not infer coefficients or trait roles from title or metadata.

main_block: No public full text, table, or verified article-linked data package.
current_permitted_action: No further automated work in the public-only phase.
prohibited_inference: Do not infer coefficients or trait roles from title or metadata.

main_block: The listed OUP route did not expose full text; no eligible DataCite, Dryad, or Zenodo source package.
current_permitted_action: Keep as an access conclusion only.
prohibited_inference: Do not assign floral morph to A or register any outcome effect.

main_block: Need to determine whether reported models expose a direct trait-to-antagonist estimate, denominator, uncertainty, and whether observations overlap the 2018 panel.
current_permitted_action: One public full-text/table screen only, with independence audit before any registry action.
prohibited_inference: Do not treat it as an independent replication or B evidence before that screen.

main_block: Individual morph and fitness fields are recoverable, but camera archives do not expose morph-specific display exposure or observation duration through public filenames/manifests.
current_permitted_action: Require a camera-layout or experiment-mapping record before opening/counting frames; handle 2016 and 2017 designs separately.
prohibited_inference: Do not substitute fruit, seed, or fitness for a pollination response or estimate colour preference from unexposed image counts.
